## Summary

Describe the goal of this PR in 2-5 lines.

## Linked Issue

- Issue: `P?.?` or GitHub issue link

## Changes

- Main code changes
- Secondary updates
- Documentation or config updates

## Validation

- [ ] `backend`: lint
- [ ] `backend`: build
- [ ] `backend`: test
- [ ] `frontend`: lint

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Scope matches a single issue
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] CI should pass
- [ ] Docs/env updated if needed
- [ ] No secret committed

## Notes

Add limitations, follow-up work, or review guidance if needed.
